---
title: "Lectures"
author: "Bill Perry"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: full

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    downloads: []
    embed-resources: false
    self-contained: false

listing:
  contents: "[0-9][0-9]_[0-9][0-9]_*/*.qmd"   # every WW_MM_<slug> lecture folder
  type: table
  sort: "order asc"          # sorts by the numeric `order:` field in each qmd's YAML,
                              # NOT by filename or title, so reordering = editing YAML
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  categories: false            # matches the data science site (no filter chips)
  fields: [title, subtitle, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Lecture"
    subtitle: "Topic"
    description: "What it covers"
    categories: "Tags"
  field-types:
    order: number             # tells Quarto to sort numerically, not alphabetically
---

Every lecture below pulls its title, topic, and description straight from the
`.qmd` file's YAML frontmatter — nothing here is hand-typed. Ordering comes from
the `order:` field, which the `sync_order_from_folder_names.R` pre-render hook
fills in automatically from each folder's `WW_MM_` number prefix. To reorder or
move a lecture to another week, just change the two leading numbers on its
folder name — the frontmatter and this page update themselves on the next render.
